Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I scored the highest in my grade![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone is looking at me with respect![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru promised to give[n]me a gift if I scored well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should talk to Mitsuru when I see her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if some of my[n]classmates are staring at me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My score was a little above average.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So there's no reason to be embarrassed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone is looking at me with pity...[n]{f 1 1}
